tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild hypoglycemia and elevated LDL and total cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Chloride is slightly above normal but likely not clinically significant. Renal function, calcium, electrolytes, and urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio are within normal limits. Overall, lipid management and monitoring of glucose levels are recommended.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
